holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

overview.description: The Dana Limited Volatility ETF (DANA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking to preserve capital and provide current income through investments in fixed income securities. Investments include short-term US government securities and investment-grade corporate bonds. DANA was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by Dana.
